remarks: Welcome to this fabulous, completely updated corner-unit townhome, perfectly situated in the heart of New Canaan, steps from downtown. Bathed in natural light from multiple exposures, this exceptional 3-bedroom, 2-full bath residence seamlessly blends timeless style with modern comfort, offering a turnkey lifestyle in one of Fairfield County's most sought-after communities. The thoughtfully designed open floor plan creates an inviting atmosphere for both everyday living and entertaining. Beautifully updated interiors flow effortlessly from room to room, including a flex-space bedroom with a Murphy Bed that converts into a desk for office use. A highlight and one-of-a-kind feature is the recently renovated screened-in porch. This charming outdoor retreat extends your living space and offers the ideal setting for morning coffee, alfresco dining or simply unwinding while enjoying nature. Rarely available in these townhomes, #84 features an in-unit washer and dryer which adds to the home's exceptional functionality. In addition to the assigned parking space, a detached garage is included, which provides valuable parking and additional storage. Residents enjoy a resort-like lifestyle with access to 2 community pools and beautifully maintained grounds. A quick walk to New Canaan's vibrant village center provides access to acclaimed restaurants, boutique shopping, and the train station. With access to the town's award-winning schools, its prime location, sophisticated updates,
